# GitHub Copilot Instructions

## Project

Refactor this legacy Flask Sudoku application into a modern, maintainable Sudoku game.

## Coding Standards

- Follow PEP8.
- Keep code modular.
- Use reusable helper functions.
- Keep Flask routes small.
- Add docstrings.
- Use meaningful variable names.
- Avoid duplicate code.
- Handle errors gracefully.

## UI

- Responsive layout.
- Support light and dark mode.
- Keep controls clean and consistent.

## Sudoku Features

Implement:

- Difficulty selector
- Timer
- Hint button
- Check button
- Live validation
- Unique solution puzzles
- Completion message
- Top 10 leaderboard
- Local Storage
- Responsive design

## Testing

Use pytest.

Generate tests before changing code.

Always keep tests passing.
